description:
OL 316 (REV. 7/2020) WWW
Autonomous Mode 
Conventional Mode
Additional information attached.
On March 12, 2026 at 8:13 AM PT a Waymo Autonomous Vehicle (“Waymo AV”) operating in Los Angeles, California was in a collision 
involving an SUV on Gorham Place near Gorham Avenue. 
 
The Waymo AV was traveling eastbound on Gorham Place when it approached the exit of a parking garage. As the Waymo AV proceeded 
forward, an SUV proceeded to exit the parking garage and entered the Waymo AV's lane of travel, and the front of the SUV made contact 
with the right side of the Waymo AV. At the time of the impact, the Waymo AV’s Level 4 ADS was engaged in autonomous mode. Both 
vehicles sustained damage.
Print
Clear Form
